name: Honey Maid Graham Muffins
recipeIngredient: 44 squares HONEY MAID Honey Grahams, finely rolled (about 3 cups crumbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crumbs, sugar, and baking powder in a medium bowl.
2. Stir in the milk, egg, and honey until just moistened. Spoon the batter into 9 greased 2 1/2-inch muffin pan cups.
3. Bake at 400°F for 15 to 18 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let stand 5 minutes before removing from the pan. Serve warm with powdered sugar glaze if desired.
Makes 9 muffins
